Main Page   Modules   Class Hierarchy   Compound List   File List   Compound Members   File Members   Related Pages  

Moleculizer Compound List

Here are the classes, structs, unions and interfaces with brief descriptions:
activationCountDumpableDumps the number of reaction activations so far
alloGpaCmdCommand to generate allosteric behavior in gpaMols
alloMol< stateClass >Template base class for mols with many states, exhibiting allostery
alloMolDataBundle of references to what a alloMolParser parses
alloMolParserParser for the one allostery command for phos-mols
alloPhosCmdCommand to specify allosteric site on a phos-mol
alloSiteCmdDoes allosteric modification of a free binding site in a complex
andPlexQueriesAND logical combinator for plex dump queries
andPlexQueries::applyNotQueryAuxiliary function class to help do AND of a number of plexQueries
andPlexQueries::applyNotTrackedQueryAuxiliary function class to help do AND of a number of plexQueries in the case that an isomorphism must be applied to the plexParam argument
arrowA stoichiometric reaction
arrow::combinationsForSubstrateAuxiliary function class for arrow propensity calculation
autoCatalog< catObject >Adds automatic destruction of the values to catalog
autoVector< autoObject >A vector of pointers that automatically deletes the pointers
beginSimCmdCommand marking the end of the definitions part of the script
binaryRxnGen< newContextClass, otherFeatureClass, reactionClass, reactFamClass >Support template for the binaryRxnGenPair template
binaryRxnGenPair< leftFeatureClass, rightFeatureClass, reactionClass, reactFamClass >Template reaction generator for binary reaction families
bindCmdAdds bindings to the plex being defined by a plexParser
boolPhosCmdCommand to dump on arbitrary test on phosphorylation state
boolStateQuery for arbitrary test of mol's phosphorylation state
catalog< catObject >A string-keyed database of pointers to objects
clockDumpableDumps dumps clock time since program start
command< parserData >Base class for parser commands
commandParser< parserData >Not quite so base class for parsers
convertMaskFunction class converts a boolean into a 't' or 'f'
countIfTrueAuxiliary function class to count the number of trues in a vector of boolean
createCmdCreate molecules out of thin air
createEventEvent to create species members
cxBindingParamParameter for reactions involving a binding in a complex
cxMolParamParameter for reactions involving a mol in a complex
cxOmniParamParameter for reactions involving a subcomplex
cxSiteParamParameter for reactions involving a free binding site in a complex
debugLineA source-file line with attached debugging info
decompFamA family of decompostion reactions
decompositionThe breaking of a binding in a complex
decompParamParameter of a decomposition reaction
decompRxnGenReaction generator for decompFam reaction family
deleteMapValue< keyType, valueType >Function class for deleting map values
deleteVectorValue< valueType >Function class for deleting vector values
dimerCmdSpecifies binding kinetics between binding sites
dimerizationReaction that binds free binding sites together
dimerizationParamParameter for dimerization reaction
dimerizeFamFamily of dimerization reactions
dimerizeRxnGenPairReaction generator for dimerization reaction family
dimerUnitProvides dimerization and decomposition reactions
dumpableAbstract base class for dumpables
dumpCmdPeriodic dump of sim-time and a list of dumpables
dumpOnceCmdDumps list of dumpables just once
dumpPlexesCmdDump a list of structures of all known complexes
dumpSpecEventExperimental event dumps mass-spectrum-like data
dumpStatsCmdDumps listed dumpables just once, but with their dump tags
echoCmdCommand to write user messages to the console (stderr)
echoRunCmdWrite a message to the console
elevenActiveCountCmdSets Ste11 active phosphorylation count
elevenATPKdCmdSets the dissociation constant between Ste11 and ATP
elevenSevenReaction giving the kinase activity of Ste11 on Ste7
elevenSevenFamFamily of scaffold kinase reactions of Ste11 on Ste7
elevenSevenParamParameter for elevenSeven reaction
elevenSevenPhosRateCmdSets rate constant for scaffold kinase Ste11 on Ste7
elevenSevenRxnGenReaction generator for elevenSeven reaction family
elevenSevenUnitProvides scaffold kinase action of Ste11 on Ste7
eventAbstract base class for all events
eventQueueThe moleculizer event schedule
exchangeParamParameter of a Gpa1 exchange reaction
feature< bearerSpecies, featureSpec >Notifies reactions of new species
featureContext< bearerSpecies, featureSpec >An entry in the contexts vector of a feature
featureContext< bearerSpecies, featureSpec >::rxnGenAbstract base class for reaction generator
featureMap< bearerSpecies, featureSpec >A container for features with common spec type
fileDataA parsed input file
fileParserThe main parser class for simulation description
fileParserDataFileParser reads commands from this data
forceInsertOne< mapClass >Auxiliary class to reset multiple map values
funcInsertOne< mapClass, functionClass >Auxiliary function class for funcInsert
gpaExchangeReaction converting Gpa1 from GDP form to GTP form
gpaExchangeFamFamily for gpaExchange reactions
gpaExchangeRateCmdCommand to set the rate of the Gpa exchange reaction
gpaExchangeRxnGenReaction generator for gpaExchangeFam reaction family
gpaExchangeUnitProvides Gpa exchange and revert reactions
gpaMolThe class of G-proteins
gpaMolCmdCommand to create Gpa1 (or other such molecules?)
gpaMolStateState of a G-protein
gpaMolStateQueryAsks what state a G-protein in a complex is in
gpaParserParser for the(!) command to create gpaMol allosteric behavior
gpaParserDataBundle of references to what gpaParser edits
gpaRevertAuto-catalytic reversion of the GTP form of Gpa1 to the GDP form
gpaRevertFamFamily of Gpa1 revert reactions
gpaRevertRateCmdCommand to set the rate of the Gpa revert reaction
gpaRevertRxnGenReaction generator for gpaRevert reaction family
gpaStateCmdCommand for dumping based on state of G-protein in a complex
gpaUnitProvides mol property of binding to GTP/GDP as does Gpa1
growCmdSchedule periodic increases or decreases in volume
growEventPeriodic event for growth or shrinkage of volume
hashChar
hashMolRec
isThisPlexFamily
kinaseA phosphorylation-regulated kinase reaction
kinaseCmdCommand to define regulated kinases
kinaseFamFamily for regulated kinase reactions
kinaseParamParameter for regulated kinase reaction
kinaseRxnGenPairReaction generator for regulated kinase reaction family
letterToBoolFunction class for converts t to true and f to false
letterTracerSingle-letter tracer for user-oriented output
linearHashLinear-congruential hash function class
loadCmdCommand to load a unit
logCmdWrite a message to a log file
makeOmniDumpable
makeQueryDumpable
map
maskAllPhosCmdCommand to dump if specified phos-mol sites are phosphorylated
maskAllPhosphorylatedQuery to dump if specified phos-mol sites are phosphorylated
maskIsPhosCmdCommand to dump if phos-mol is in a particular phosphorylation state
maskIsStateQuery to dump if phos-mol is in a particular phosphorylation state
maskPhosCmd
maskPhosphorylatedQuery to dump complex if some phos-mol sites are phosphorylated
massive
massSpecAccum
mKinaseA more-elaborate phosphorylation-regulated kinase reaction
mKinaseCmdCommand to define more elaborate regulated kinases
mKinaseFamFamily for more elaborate regulated kinase reactions
mKinaseRxnGenPairReaction generator for more elaborate regulated kinase reaction family
molAbstract, base-class protein constituent of a complex
molarFactor
molCmdDefines an "indivisible" protein and its binding sites
moleculizerThe main application object
moleculizerOptions
molPhosphorylatedQuery to dump complex if a certain phos-mol is phosphorylated
molsCmdAdds mols to the plex being defined by a plexParser
molState(Concrete) base class for state of molecules
molWeightAccum
multimap
nameTracerFull tracer for file output
notPhosphorylatedCmdCommand to dump if mol in complex is not phosphorylated at all
notPlexQueryNOT logical combinator for plex dump queries
omniDumpCmdGives omniplex dump tag and begins queries to test subcomplexes for dumping
omnifyCmdDesignates a plex as omni
omniPlexCmdGives name to subcomplex and begins its definition
omniPlexDumpableDumpable attached to omniPlexFeature to dump complexes based on subcomplex data
omniPlexDumpable::addSpeciesPopTots up the populations of species dumped by omniplex dumpable
omniPlexFeatureFeature notifying reactions of new species with a given subcoplex
pair
paramQuery
paramReaction< parameter, containingFamily >An automatically generated reaction; lives in a reactionFamily
paramSpecies< parameterType, containingFamily >
paramSpecies< parameterType, containingFamily >::paramDumpable
paramSpecies< parameterType, containingFamily >::paramDumpable::addParamPop
paramSpecies< parameterType, containingFamily >::paramQuery
paramSpecies< parameterType, containingFamily >::passAllQuery
parserBase class for parsers
parserPlexComplex embellished with instance names for the mols
phosMol
phosMolCmd
phosMolStateThe state of a phos-mol
phosphataseCmdCommand to define small-molecule phosphatases
phosphorylateCmd
phosphorylatedCmdCommand to dump complex if a certain phos-mol is phosphorylated
phosStateMixinMixin adding phosphorylation state to mol state
phosUnit
plexA protein complex
plexBindingA binding in a complex
plexCmdGives name to complex and begins its definition
plexDefinitionAdds allostery description to parserPlex
plexDumpCmdGives plex dump tag and begins queries to test complexes for dumping
plexFamilyA structural family of species of complexes
plexFamily::applyOmniModsFunction class to apply allosteric modifications from omniplex
plexFamily::doBehaviorizeOmni
plexFamily::doBehaviorizeSite
plexFamily::dumpPopAuxiliary function class for diagnostic dump of species in a plexFamily
plexFamily::getDefaultMolParam
plexFamily::injectAlloSiteIn
plexFamily::insertBindingParamHandles a single bindingParam in the construction of a plexParam
plexFamily::insertFreeSiteParamHandles a single siteParam in the construction of a plexParam
plexIsoPairAn isomorphism of complexes
plexIsoSearchAlgorithm to determine when complexes are structurally the same
plexMapStructure-preserving map from one complex to another
plexParamParameter for plexSpecies
plexParserParses commands that define the structure of a plex: mols and bindings
plexParserDataBundle of references to what a plexParser edits
plexQueryBase class for queries about complexes
plexQueryParserParser for queries appearing in plex-dump command
plexSiteSpecSpecifier for a site on a complex
plexSpeciesSelected
plexUnitUnit providing complexes and subcomplexes
plexUnit::fixOmniPlexFamilyAuxiliary class to do "prepareToRun" chores on single omniplexFamily
plexUnit::fixPlexFamilyAuxiliary class to do "prepareToRun" on a single plexFamily
prepareUnitToRun
ptaseSmall-molecule phosphatase with mol substrate
ptaseFamFamily for ptase reactions
ptaseParamParameter for small-molecule phosphatase with mol substrate
ptaseRxnGenReaction generator for ptase reaction family
queryDataBundle of references to what a plexQueryParser edits
reactCountDumpableDumps the number of reactions that exist
reactEventCountDumpableDumps the number of reactions performed so far
reactFamRxnGen< contextClass, reactionClass, reactFamClass >Generates reactions for a reaction family
reactFamRxnGen< contextClass, reactionClass, reactFamClass >::reactionMakerFunction class to create and install reactions
reactionBase class of all reactions
reactionCmdCommand to create a stoichiometric reaction
reactionFamilyA container class for automatically generated reactions
recognizerClass to maintain structural classification of complexes
reportIsoSearchAlgorithm to determine when complexes are structurally the same
revertParamParameter for revert reaction
runCmdRuns simulation for specified amount of simulation time
runParserParser for simulation control commands
runParserDataReferences needed by runParser
rxnGen
rxnGen
rxnGen
rxnGen
rxnGen
rxnGen
rxnGen
scheduleReactionFunction class for rescheduling reactions en masse
sdphosDemo/utility spontaneous dephosphorylation reaction
sdphosFamFamily of (demo/utility) spontaneous dephosphorylations
sdphosParamParameter for (demo/utility) spontaneous dephosphorylation reaction
sdphosRxnGenReaction generator for (demo/utility) spontaneous dephosphorylation
seedCmdSeed random number generator using an arbitrary token
sensitizeToOneSubstrate
sevenATPKdCmdSets the dissociation constant between Ste7 and ATP
sevenThreeReaction giving the kinase activity of Ste7 on Fus3
sevenThreeFamFamily of scaffold kinase reactions of Ste7 on Fus3
sevenThreeParamParameter for sevenThree reaction
sevenThreePhosRateCmdSets the rate at which active Ste7 phosphorylates Fus3
sevenThreeRxnGenReaction generator for Ste7 scaffold kinase reaction family
sevenThreeUnitProvides scaffold kinase reaction of Ste7 on Fus3
simpleMolA mol with no state except its molecular weight
simTimeDumpableDumps the simulation time
siteCmdCommand to create "abstract site" to define allosteric free site behavior
siteShapePlaceholder for binding site shape
smallMolCmdCommand to create a "small molecule."
speciesBase class for all chemical species
speciesCountDumpableDumps the number of species that have been encountered
speciesDumpableDumps the population of a species
speciesFamily< parameter, memberSpecies >Template container for automatically generated species
speciesFamily< parameter, memberSpecies >::notifyDumpableOf
speciesMapDumper
sphosDemo/utility spontaneous phosphorylation reaction
sphosFamFamily for (demo/utility) spontaneous phosphorylation
sphosParamParameter for (demo/utility) spontaneous phosphorylation reaction
sphosRxnGenReaction generator for (demo/utility) spontaneous phosphorylation
stateMatchesMaskFunction class for arbitrary boolean phosphorylation state test
stateMol< stateClass >Template base class for mols that have state other than just their molecular weight
stateVarBase class for moleculizer state variables
stochSpeciesA simple molecule with no binding sites
stochUnitUnit for small molecules and stoichiometric reactions
stopEventEvent that stops the simulation
stringToMaskAdaptor class for stringMask function
subPlexSpecContext specifier for subcomplex
tabDumpEventEvent that periodically dumps simulation data
thisPlexFamilyIso
threeActiveCountCmdSets the number of times that Fus3 must be phosphorylated to become an active kinase of Ste7
threeATPKdCmdSets the dissociation constant between Fus3 and ATP
threeSevenThe scaffold kinase reaction of Fus3 on Ste7
threeSevenFamFamily of scaffold kinase reactions of Fus3 on Ste7
threeSevenParamParameter for threeSeven reaction
threeSevenPhosRateCmd
threeSevenRxnGenReaction generator for Fus3 kinase reaction family
threeSevenUnitUnit providing the scaffold kinase reaction of Fus3 on Ste7
traceCmdOpen a trace stream and attach listed tracers to it
tracerBase class for creating output whenever a reaction happens
twentyATPKdCmdSets the dissociation constant between Ste20 and ATP
twentyElevenSpecial kinase reaction of Ste20 on Ste11
twentyElevenFamFamily for special kinase reactions of Ste20 on Ste11
twentyElevenParamParameter for twentyEleven reaction
twentyElevenPhosRateCmdSets rate constant for special kinase reaction of Ste20 on Ste11
twentyElevenRxnGenReaction generator for special kinase reaction of Ste20 on Ste11
twentyElevenUnitUnit for special kinase reaction of Ste20 on Ste11
unary_function
unaryRxnGen< newContextClass, reactionClass, reactFamClass >Template reaction generator for "unary" reaction families
unitSupport class for loadable libraries
updateOneSpecies
vector
volumeCmdSchedule an event "now" to set the reaction volume in liters
volumeDumpableDumps the current simulation volume
volumeEventEvent to change the volume once
